title: Real-Time Rendering, Fourth Edition
creator: Tomas Akenine-Möller, Eric Haines, and Naty Hoffman
description: A comprehensive reference to the modern real-time graphics pipeline, transforms, shading, textures, lighting, shadows, sampling, acceleration, and many production rendering techniques.
useful: A durable technical reference for understanding why rendering systems work, rather than only how to operate one engine’s tools.
audience: Graphics programmers and advanced technical artists who are comfortable with mathematics and rendering code.
learning: Map the stages of a real-time rendering pipeline
Compare lighting, shadow, and sampling techniques
Choose further research from a broad technical reference
